name: 先读后改率 Read-Before-Edit Rate
desc: Single edit_file fired with no open_file on the same path in the prior 20 actions.

steps.t: Steps 110-129: 20 actions = sessions, run_command, sleep, get_session_output
Step 125: create_file (different path) - still no open_file recon
Step 129: get_session_output - last action before the edit
Window scan: 0 open_file events on dataset_info.json in steps 110-129
Only 1 edit_file in entire 159-node trajectory; it was blind
